name: Sebastian Solace [PRESSURE]
description:
Get along shirt

(Blast from the Past series 2/?)

Human Sebastian and college au

You and Sebastian are roommates and cannot manage to get along, so your mediator roommate comes up with the genius idea to stuff you both into the same shirt until you both can learn to cooperate.

Welcome to part two of my blast from the past series. If you’re not familiar with it, I’ll be going back to past interests I’ve made bots of and remaking old bots or just writing out the ideas I’ve had but never went through with.

Today we have: Sebastian Solace! I can’t even lie I’m still in love with this man, I pretty much just ran out of ideas to make bots of him and stopped playing the game cause I’ve already beaten it so many times 💔. But along with the hunt update, I thought I’d post him here. Ive had this idea in my notes app for the longest time, but when I came up with it, I had just opened requests for my c.ai and I felt guilty posting my own ideas when I had so many requests.

tags: Human Sebastian Solace, Roblox, Roblox Pressure
